summary.basis: Stage65 residual Stage63 external error audit
summary.primary_design_goal: Reduce remaining false NOT_ENTITLED on gold SUPPORT/REFUTE while improving REFUTE/SUPPORT polarity separation.
summary.recommended_next_stage: Stage67 implement synthetic Stage66 residual bridge generator
summary.allowed_claim: Stage66 defines a non-leaking synthetic residual bridge expansion plan based on Stage65 error taxonomy and counts.
summary.forbidden_claim: Do not claim Stage66 uses VitaminC residual text for training; it only uses residual error taxonomy/counts to set synthetic quotas.

proposed_bridge_families.purpose: Teach the model that semantically sufficient evidence should license SUPPORT instead of defaulting to NOT_ENTITLED.
must_not_use: Do not paraphrase Stage65 residual sample rows.
Do not use external labels or texts.

proposed_bridge_families.purpose: Teach the model that same-frame predicate/value conflict should license REFUTE instead of NOT_ENTITLED.
must_not_use: Do not copy VitaminC residual examples.
Do not use real external examples as templates.
Use synthetic entities and synthetic facts only.

proposed_bridge_families.purpose: Separate SUPPORT vs REFUTE when frame and predicate are covered but polarity/value relation differs.
must_not_use: Do not add external evaluation examples.
Pairs must be synthetic controlled contrasts.

proposed_bridge_families.purpose: Reinforce entitlement and polarity in digit/year/comparison-heavy cases identified by Stage65 feature audit.
must_not_use: Do not use corrupted temporal examples.
Use only newly generated synthetic numeric/temporal facts.

proposed_bridge_families.purpose: Keep a small safety anchor for related-but-insufficient evidence so positive-skewed residual bridges do not over-entitle.
must_not_use: Do not increase NE rows enough to reintroduce collapse.

leakage_constraints.requirement: All Stage66 rows must be generated from synthetic templates only.
leakage_constraints.reason: Avoid external leakage from Stage63/Stage65 VitaminC residuals.

leakage_constraints.requirement: Stage65 residual samples may inform taxonomy/quota only; their claim/evidence text must not be copied, paraphrased, or templated.
Do not use data/controlled_v5_v3.jsonl time_swap rows or any corrupted temporal examples.
leakage_constraints.reason: time_swap is excluded from main classification training.

leakage_constraints.requirement: Stage66 bridge may be appended to train only after clean main split; never to dev/checkpoint selection.
Do not use VitaminC metrics to tune composer/recovery thresholds.
leakage_constraints.reason: Stage63 is diagnostic, not a tuning target.

leakage_constraints.requirement: Stage66 is SUPPORT/REFUTE-heavy but keeps small NE safety rows.
leakage_constraints.reason: Residual failure is dominated by false NE, but false entitlement must remain bounded.

implementation_plan.task: Implement synthetic Stage66 residual bridge generator.
implementation_plan.allowed_execution: local/static generation only; no model training.

implementation_plan.task: Static audit of generated Stage66 residual bridge.
implementation_plan.allowed_execution: dataset audit only; no model training.

implementation_plan.task: Runner integration plan for Stage57 + Stage66 bridge train-only append.
implementation_plan.allowed_execution: report-only or runner static patch planning; no external tuning.
